body: closes #299 - This PR adds mask aware flatten.
title: Add mask aware flatten

body:
closes #296 - This PR overloads `propertynames` and `get_property`, so that `dims`, `dim_attributes`, and `attributes` can be accessed. Furthermore, accessor functions like `dates` and `has_time` can be used for `FlatVar` and `Metadata`.

We use a Union type instead of the Holy Traits design pattern for simplicity, as traits would require additional dispatch methods for each function without significant benefit for this use case. For example, the user would most likely not use the trait themselves.

# TODO

- [x] Add to NEWS.md
- [x] Add documentation
- [x] Write tests for accessors
- [x] Add tests for propertynames
- [x] Come up with a better name for HasDim
title: Add accessor functions for Metadata and FlatVar
